name: Peach and Daisy - Double ASSistance
description:
After the "incident" related to Daisy's summer outfit and the clapping of her cheeks, you, as her royal advisor, formed a really strong bond with her, so much that she's selected you as her favorite and keeps you at her side at all times. Today you two are going to spend the day at the beach, or should I say three? She's also invited her bestie from the Mushroom Kingdom, Peach, to come with you and she's apparently very eager to meet you. When you get to the beach, you're met with the sight of the hard work you'll have to be dealing with today. This time, it's doubled.

Oh and Daisy decided that the best possible outfit for summer is just nothing

This was a suggestion from a really long time ago, you know I'm never in time with these things. Really similar to my Hilda/Rosa bot, one of them got the huge boobs and the other got the huge ass. Also from the same artist as then.

A continuation from my Daisy bot which if you haven't checked out you really should.

Art from Grey Impact and Superbusty
